title: ECONOMY x. Under the Islamic Republic
units: narrative with cited statistical figures (GDP by sector, inflation, budget, trade)
license_terms: Encyclopaedia Iranica -- academic reference, cite author/article per their citation guidance
notes: Article by Vahid F. Nowshirvani (Vol. VIII, Fasc. 2, pp. 156-163; published Dec 15, 1997; last updated Jun 29, 2015). Covers the 1979 revolution's economic impact, ideological/constitutional setting, mass nationalization of industry/banking, macroeconomic developments 1977-1992 (GDP by sector, inflation ~16.4%/yr 1979-92), agriculture and the 1980 land reform law, manufacturing nationalization, oil/gas sector collapse and partial recovery, Islamic (interest-free) banking law of 1983, fiscal policy and oil revenue share of budget, and foreign trade/exchange controls. Companion piece to economy-ix-pahlavi-period (same encyclopedia entry series). Retrieved via browser tool (Cloudflare bot-challenge blocked plain curl/WebFetch, same as economy-ix -- see that manifest for details) and get_page_text extraction, saved as clean plain text.
